Saute shallots and garlic with enough EVOO to cook, over medium-low heat until soft and very light in colour.
Remove from heat, add to vitamix blender with all ingredients except the Grapeseed Oil
Blend on high until smooth
Slowly add the Grapeseed Oil to the running blender to emulsify into the sauce
Adjust for seasoning, reserve in quart containers in the cooler.
